title: greenlight panel verdict
description: Stage-transition verdict (concept-greenlight, preproduction-exit, slice-greenlight, alpha/beta gates). pass/redesign/kill — denial is a normal outcome, not an error. Runs on the greenlight tier for the three project-fate gates. Verdict is judged STRICTLY against criteria agreed before the work was built.

criteria.description: each pre-agreed acceptance criterion, individually judged

conditions.description: for pass-with-conditions: what must be true before the next gate

redesign_directives.description: for redesign: what specifically to change before resubmitting

next_stage.description: the stage this verdict advances to on pass; null on redesign/kill
